---
title: "Commentaries on the Life and Reign of Charles the First, King of England"
---

## Commentaries on the Life and Reign of Charles the First, King of England

**Author:** Isaac D\'Israeli
**Date:** 1828-31
**Imprint:** London: Colburn

### Notes

CMY may have read the 1851 edition.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
